stemHtml: If no information has been received, what information is given to an aircraft on its first call to Tower prior to taxi?

options.a: Runway in use, wind, QNH, visibility below 10 km, Transition Level and time.
options.b: Runway in use, wind, QNH and visibility below 10 km.
options.c: Runway in use, QNH and visibility below 10 km.
options.d: Runway in use, wind, QNH and Transition Level.
